main.name: Tanishq Sharma
main.bio: I am a Fullstack Developer and Machine learning enthusiast , currently in final year of my bachelors degree . Friends call me T , T is a man with really good coding skills who can work all solo or in a team .
main.contactmessage: Have a project for me? Think I'd be a good fit for your team? I'd love to hear from you, give me a shout by email or by using the form below if you'd like to get in contact with me.

resume.skillmessage: I'm a tinkerer and am always interested in playing around with new technologies but these are the ones that have really won me over

education.school: Maharaja Agrasen Institute of technology , Delhi
education.description: Here I am doing my Bachelors in Computer Science and achieving thorough education in the underlying theory, concepts, and implementaion of various skills like Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, DBMS, Object Oriented Programming .

skills.name: Java
skills.description: I started using java 2 years ago. It is the second language I am familiar with in terms of data-structure and algorithm programming.

skills.name: Golang
skills.description: I am relativey new to Golang , my sole experience in it is through a web-app project

skills.name: Javascript
skills.description: Experience with developing few projects in JS has made me pretty comfortable with it .

skills.name: C++
skills.description: C++ was my first programming language that I started using 7 years ago. It is the language I am most familiar with in terms of data-structure and algorithm programming.

skills.name: Postgres
skills.description: I have used many different database systems and am better educated and experienced with Relational Databases

skills.name: MongoDB
skills.description: For many applications, the ease of use of MongoDB better suits my needs and it is much more enjoyable to work with

skills.name: React Js
skills.description: I am fairly new to React.I have built few ReactJS based frontends for my webapps and even this website

skills.name: Node JS
skills.description: Node JS is one my server-side scripting language of choice. The bulk of my experience with it has been in through online courses and various projects

skills.name: Python
skills.description: I learnt python when i developed Machine Learning models.I often use python to automate various processes

skills.name: Machine Learning
skills.description: Idea of Making machines smart enough to work like humans has always attracted me . My knowledge in this feild comes from various meetups ,MOOC courses , research conferences and self initiated projects

skills.name: Heroku
skills.description: I use Heroku as my hosting platform for most of my projects because so far they are all unpaid and their free tier is convenient.

skills.name: Git
skills.description: I use Git for all of my projects so far. I have used Git for version control in small teams and have toyed around with contributing to Open Source Projects.

projects.title: Sentiment Analysis of Statement
projects.category: A ML classifier to classify polarity of statement as positive or negetive

testimonials.text: We would love the opportunity to work with Tanishq on multiple occasions , it will be a pleasure. He is driven and motivated with a consistently positive attitude. Tanishq excels at communicating with others and is always willing to work hard until he solves the problem at hand. We regret! not hiring him :( .Don't be like us.
testimonials.user: Google, Apple, Microsoft, Facebook, De-Shaw etc......
